channel.title: Meziantou.net on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Evaluating CRON and RRule expressions in .NET
item.description: Evaluating recurring date patterns is a common requirement in many applications. Whether you need every day, every Monday at 9 AM, or the last day of each month, you need a reliable way to calculate upcoming occurrences. Meziantou.Framework.Scheduling is a NuGet package that parses and evaluates both CRON expressions and iCalendar recurrence rules (RRule). Installation You can install the package from… Link to article: https://www.meziantou.net/evaluating-cron-and-rrule-expressions-in-dotnet.htm?utm_medium=social&utm_source=syndication
